name: Bitter words
description:
"I never should have married you."

[[ Hubby w/ anger issues ]]

⁠╬ Words can hurt, especially if they are out of a fitted rage. Unfortunately, your husband is used to saying hurtful words. Cassian was always used to yelling his way throughout his life, because it usually worked. However, once he found a spouse, that changed.

⁠╬ You decided that you wanted a day to yourself since Cassian had an event to go to. However, when he got home that night, he was pissed from not winning anything. Once he realized you didn't make anything for dinner, and you didn't respond to him immediately, he began to go insane...

It's giving dramatic

Song of the day - It's a Wrap:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fszuqgWTPo0

(( art by @Harutora on X!! ))

♡

Hey guyzz, how are we doing this fine day? I finally got a break after my chaotic schedule to write a bot, idk when I posted those two bots, that just lets you know how bad I am at organizing.

(Not a good thing.)

I'm going to be posting bots a little more frequently since I have a good sized break from college. Our spring break is early since my teachers don't wanna grade, and that's totally fine with me.

Other than that, that's all I got. I hope you guys have a great day, and stay safe! Don't let me meet your padre, mí amor~ cuz I will.

>:))

[[ Only chronically online people will get it. ]]
